prompt_latex: What is the least possible value of $x^2+10x+17$?
solution_latex: Completing the square gives $x^2+10x+17=(x+5)^2-8$. The square term is zero at $x=-5$, so the least value is $-8$.

prompt_latex: What is the least possible value of $x^2+8x+9$?
solution_latex: Completing the square gives $x^2+8x+9=(x+4)^2-7$. The square term is zero at $x=-4$, so the least value is $-7$.
